sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n50933" key="i)sa/rxaios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἰσ-άρχαιος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n50933.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">equally ancient</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4093.tlg001:2:55" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choerob.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Theod.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.55</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
